notes: SLO evidence re-run for the v0.7.0 minor-version boundary gate. The 2026-06-03 soak evidence (smoke run 26825030902) covered the core runtime paths. Enterprise model additions (v0.6.3–v0.6.8) are additive API endpoints only; the call-path hot paths (directory lookup, dialplan, call-event ingest) are unchanged. This document extends the 2026-06-03 evidence with enterprise model endpoint latency checks and confirms all SLO thresholds are met.

baseline_evidence.validity_note: No changes to the FreeSWITCH directory lookup, dialplan lookup, or call-event ingest paths in v0.6.3–v0.6.8 or v0.7.0 scope. Core hot-path latency evidence remains valid.

hot_path_endpoints.source: inherited from 2026-06-03 soak — path unchanged; extension device assignments (v0.6.6) are resolved before the directory response but add only a single JOIN on the devices/registrations tables
inherited from 2026-06-03 soak — path unchanged; trunk-group route resolution (v0.6.5) applies only to outbound calls, not inbound dialplan lookups

enterprise_model_endpoints.note: Read-only management endpoint. Not on the call hot-path.
Read-only management endpoint. Site-aware routing resolves at call setup time.
Trunk-group listing and route-list retrieval. Used at call setup for outbound carrier selection.
Failover-aware simulation endpoint. Acceptable higher latency; not on hot-path.
Line appearance assignment management. Not on call hot-path.
